case.title: ST LOUIS CAN CO. v. GENERAL AMERICAN LIFE INS CO

opinion.h4: ST LOUIS CAN CO. v. GENERAL AMERICAN LIFE INS CO, (1935)
opinion.h2: ST. LOUIS CAN COMPANY, petitioner, v. GENERAL AMERICAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY et al.* No. 157.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. T. M. Pierce and Samuel H. Liberman, both of St. Louis, Mo., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Eighth Circuit granted.
* Writ of certiorari dismissed 296 U.S. 660, 56 S. Ct. 305.
